meta.purpose: Examples that show judgment structure rather than scripts.
meta.load_condition: Load when examples, transformation patterns, or before/after critique are needed.

cases.brief: A SaaS hero section has 7 elements animating simultaneously with mixed easings.
cases.bad_pattern: Title fades in from left, subtitle scales from center, CTA bounces from bottom, background image zooms, floating icons orbit, gradient shifts, and a counter ticks up — all at once. Result: viewer cannot identify the primary message.
cases.master_pattern: Diagnose: 7 motion groups active simultaneously, 3 different easing characters, no holds. Fix: title enters first (hold 500ms), subtitle reveals (hold 400ms), CTA appears (hold), background and decorative elements remain still. Result: clear attention path, 3 groups max at any moment.

cases.brief: An AI-generated explainer video feels robotic and emotionally flat.
cases.bad_pattern: All scene transitions are uniform 400ms with power2.inOut. Every hold is exactly 200ms. Objects appear and disappear at regular intervals. No timing accent, no surprise, no rhythm.
cases.master_pattern: Diagnose: uniform timing across all beats, uniform easing, no variation in hold length. Fix: make one transition snappier (200ms with power3.in), one slower (700ms with power4.out), one hold longer (800ms before the key insight). Add one rhythmic surprise where something appears slightly early.
